sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110635" key="fh/lwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φήλ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n110635.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deception, cheat,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
